properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 66/23
 NORWEGIAN SEA. ANDOYA NW. LUNCH OPERATION. DANGER AREAS.
 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT MARINE OPERATION IN THE PERIOD 30 MAY - 11 JUNE 2023.
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA
 70-23.0N 003-07.0E
 68-30.0N 005-42.0E
 68-18.0N 008-55.0E
 68-31.0N 011-12.0E
 69-42.0N 015-37.0E
 70-39.0N 016-44.0E
 72-26.0N 014-07.0E
 72-34.0N 009-53.0E
 70-23.0N 003-07.0E
 NOTE: DURING THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PERIODS, MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO 
 AVOID THE NOTFIED DANGER AREAS, OR TO CONTACT ANDOYA SPACCE FOR COORDINATION. 
 THE OPERATION CENTER CAN BE REACHED BY TELEPHONE +4776144582 OR BY MARITIME
 VHF CHANNEL 16 AND 14
 CHARTS: 303, 304, 311, 312, 515
